rulings.Case Title: BRUCE GLEASON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Stay For Determination Of Issuance Of Order To Arbitrate Re: Counsel Brayton & Purcell, Llps' Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Pltf
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 3, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1. Bruce Gleason¿s motion for stay for determination of issuance of order to arbitrate re: Brayton Purcell¿s motion to be relieved as counsel: hearing required for the court to determine if there is an arbitrable dispute. The hearing will take place only in the presence of Mr. Gleason and his current counsel and courtroom staff. Mr. Gleason may participate in the hearing by telephone. Brayton Purcell is directed to inform Mr. Gleason of this tentative ruling and to further inform him that, unless he appears in person for the hearing, courtroom staff will call him at the number listed in the papers he filed on this motion. = (220/HEK)
